compiled_state.title: Update merge and lifecycle script tests for v3-only code paths
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Update merge and lifecycle script tests for v3-only paths. (1) test-merge-to-main-qt4u.sh: remove Test 12 HAS_V2_CASE assert. (2) test-merge-to-main-cleanliness.sh: update path exclusion patterns from v2 to v3 directory. (3) test-lifecycle-portability.sh: comment update at line 102. (4) test-commit-failure-tracker.sh: remove v2 fallback grep refs at lines 86,136,273. (5) test-merge-squash-rebase.sh: comment update for index file. Depends on T4 guard (701b-6c9f).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
